log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Grung — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:6+6=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
--- Grung — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:13+3=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Grung — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:12+9=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Grung — Bardic Musician HP: 48/67
Frost Giant attacks Grung — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:19+9=28 vs AC 14] HIT! 30 damage. Grung — Bardic Musician HP: 18/67
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Grung — Bardic Musician with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Grung — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:2+6=8 vs AC 14] MISS.
--- Grung — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:9+3=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:17+-2=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 3/3 targets affected.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 3 ===
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Grung — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Ogre.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:16+-2=14 vs DC 16] FAIL! 2 psychic damage. HP: 57/59
→ ⚠ Ogre: Charm broken by damage! No longer incapacitated.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Grung — Bardic Musician.
→ Grung — Bardic Musician healed for 7 HP. HP: 25/67
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
